/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AlpineCmdIf.dir/AlpineConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineCmdIf.dir/AlpineCmdIf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineCmdIf.dir/JsonRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineCmdIf.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineCmdIf.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonReader.cpp.o -o ../bin/AlpineCmdIf  ../lib/libApplCore.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../lib/libSysUtils.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../lib/libspdlog.a
